utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All five appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs:
- health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with clear plan names and monthly/annual costs; also totals. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Contains home/contents insurance (PrimeHome Premium Coverage) with monthly/annual costs. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Has a selected plan with monthly/annual costs, but also includes an optional addon priced as “Approximately €5 per day based on usage,” which is not a fixed cost. However, the core travel insurance with costs is present; the item requires travel insurance with costs, which is satisfied by the selected plan. Thus, considered fully specified.
- additional_services: Lists services with costs, but some are given as monthly only without annual, and one-time options exist. The format asks for “any enhancement services with costs,” not necessarily both monthly and annual; costs are provided. Considered specified.
- total_budget: Provides monthly and annual totals for two scenarios; this is a complete cost breakdown. Fully specified.
Therefore, all 5 items are included and sufficiently specified per the requested coverage elements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items named in the final coverage plan and match them exactly to entries in the ground-truth ratings. For health physical: PrimeCare Premium Plan and VitalPlus Standard Plan exist; ratings are 10 and 6. For mental health: PrimeCare Premium Plan (Mental Health) corresponds to PrimeCare Premium Plan under mental_health with rating 10; LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental Health) corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan under mental_health with rating 8. Property: PrimeHome Premium Coverage exists with rating 10. Travel: PrimeTravel Premium Plan exists with rating 10. Enhancements/additional services: Wellness Programs for Physical Health maps to Wellness Programs (rating 10). Emergency Mental Health Care maps to Emergency Mental Health Care (rating 8). Telemedicine Services maps to Telemedicine Services (rating 10). Additional Wellness Programs is not a distinct ground-truth item beyond Wellness Programs, so no rating mapping. Smart Home Integration exists in property_enhancement_services with rating 8. Home Maintenance Program exists with rating 7. 24/7 Travel Assistance exists in travel_enhancement_services with rating 10. Premium Insurance Membership, Insurance Portfolio Management, and Claims Advocacy Service correspond to general_services with ratings 10, 10, and 9 respectively.
